patches.find: Note: V51.0 now acknowledges WIN-004's 'station ratio proxy method' was 'methodologically invalid.'
patches.rationale: This claimed dome concession does not appear anywhere in the dome's V50.6 or V51.0 raw-text captures. Neither 'station ratio proxy method' nor 'methodologically invalid' appears in any raw-text file. The sentence is a fabricated attribution. Removing it strengthens the review's credibility — we should not claim the dome said something it did not say.

patches.find: MHD simulations reproduce SAA splitting from core dynamics. The dome has no fluid-dynamics mechanism for flux-patch separation. Author concedes methodology was invalid.
patches.replace: MHD simulations reproduce SAA splitting from core dynamics. The dome has no fluid-dynamics mechanism for flux-patch separation.
patches.rationale: Removes 'Author concedes methodology was invalid' which was based on the fabricated dome concession. The remaining text accurately characterizes our rebuttal without false attribution.
